semantic.role: Vitest end-to-end test suite that validates the ArchSpine CLI pipeline via mock (simulated) commands in isolated temporary git repositories.
responsibilities: Create temporary directories and initialize git repositories to serve as isolated test environments for each scenario.
Execute the pre-built CLI binary (`dist/cli/index.js`) with various subcommands and assertions.
Clean up test artifacts and restore state after each test execution via vitest lifecycle hooks.
Validate that CLI pipeline steps (scan, sync, etc.) produce expected outputs, error codes, and side effects in a controlled mock setting.
Adapt test expectations to reflect changes from CLI refactoring, such as removed legacy aliases and updated schemas.
outOfScope: Production logic of the CLI or its subsystems (scanning, AST extraction, LLM integration, etc.).
Real network calls or interactions with external LLM providers.
Unit tests of individual modules or services.
Integration tests that require a fully initialized ArchSpine repository or multi-language project.
invariants: Test file must end with `.test.ts` or `.spec.ts` as per repository convention.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Maintain end-to-end test coverage for the CLI pipeline to ensure that refactored components (e.g., removed legacy CLI aliases, schema changes) behave correctly in a simulated environment.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: Updated to align with removal of legacy CLI aliases and rebuilt documentation/schema, adjusting test expectations accordingly.
